name: Vegetarian Stock
recipeInstructions:
I rarely peel potatoes, but when I do, I save the peels for this delicious stock. Keep vegetable trimmings in a plastic bag in the freezer until you have enough for stock.
1. Mince garlic cloves and chop onions; slice celery.
2. Place all ingredients in a large stock pot.
3. Bring to a boil. Skim any foam that rises to the surface.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 1½ to 2 hours.
5. Strain the stock through a fine-mesh sieve into another container; cool, cover, and refrigerate or freeze.
